---
title: "Bootstrap Escenari 50%"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-05-31"
output: html_document
---

# Bootstrap PARAL·LELITZAT 50%
```{r}
# =========================
# BOOTSTRAP PARAL·LELITZAT OPTIMITZAT - ESCENARI 50% VARIABLES RELLEVANTS
# Replicant exactament el codi de referència:
#   - B = 20
#   - Indexació: as.factor(model$model)
#   - p = 0.5 fix al net benefit
# =========================

setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")

library(bigstep)
library(futurize)
library(progressify)
library(caret)

# ── Configuració paral·lel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
plan(multisession, workers = 12)

# ── Paràmetres ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
iters_boot <- iters * 2
num_vars2  <- num_vars / 2     # 50 variables al Bootstrap
num_sig2   <- num_vars2 / 2    # 25 variables rellevants al Bootstrap
B          <- 20               # igual que el codi de referència

# ── Funció de mètriques (idèntica al codi de referència, p = 0.5 fix) ───────
metriques <- function(vars_seleccionades, p = 0.5, nv) {
  num_sig     <- nv / 2
  real_labels <- c(rep(1, num_sig), rep(0, nv - num_sig))
  pred_labels <- rep(0, nv)
  pred_labels[vars_seleccionades] <- 1

  cm <- caret::confusionMatrix(
    as.factor(pred_labels),
    as.factor(real_labels),
    positive = "1"
  )

  TP <- cm$table[2, 2]; FP <- cm$table[2, 1]
  FN <- cm$table[1, 2]; TN <- cm$table[1, 1]

  c(sensibilitat  = ifelse((TP+FN)==0, NA, TP/(TP+FN)),
    especificitat = ifelse((TN+FP)==0, NA, TN/(TN+FP)),
    VPP           = ifelse((TP+FP)==0, NA, TP/(TP+FP)),
    VPN           = ifelse((TN+FN)==0, NA, TN/(TN+FN)),
    accuracy      = (TP+TN)/(TP+TN+FP+FN),
    net_benefit   = (TP/nv) - (FP/nv)*(p/(1-p)))
}

# ── Inicialització resultats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
resultats_boot_50 <- data.frame(
  N             = integer(),
  pi            = numeric(),
  correlation   = character(),
  Sensibilitat  = numeric(),
  Especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP           = numeric(),
  VPN           = numeric(),
  Accuracy      = numeric(),
  NetBenefit    = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ── Bucle principal sobre escenaris ─────────────────────────────────────────
system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb[i, "N"]
    pi_val      <- as.numeric(comb[i, "pi"])
    correlation <- as.character(comb[i, "correlation"])

    cat(sprintf("\n=== Escenari %d/%d: N=%s, pi=%s, corr=%s ===\n",
                i, nrow(comb), N, pi_val, correlation))

    # Extreure NOMÉS l'escenari actiu → minimitza serialització als workers
    X2_i <- X2[[i]]
    Y2_i <- Y2[[i]]

    # ── Sintaxi correcta de futurize ─────────────────────────────────────────
    resultats_raw <- lapply(1:iters_boot, function(j) {

      library(bigstep)
      library(caret)

      X_base <- X2_i[[j]]
      y_base <- Y2_i[[j]]
      n_boot <- nrow(X_base)

      seleccio_vars <- matrix(0, nrow = B, ncol = num_vars2)
      colnames(seleccio_vars) <- paste0("X", 1:num_vars2)

      for (b in 1:B) {
        idx_boot <- sample(1:n_boot, n_boot, replace = TRUE)
        X_boot   <- X_base[idx_boot, ]
        y_boot   <- y_base[idx_boot]

        tryCatch({
          d     <- prepare_data(y = y_boot, X_boot, type = "logistic")
          model <- stepwise(d, crit = aic)

          # ✅ Indexació idèntica al codi de referència
          seleccio_vars[b, as.factor(model$model)] <- 1

        }, error = function(e) {
          cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d, boot %d: %s\n",
                      i, j, b, conditionMessage(e)))
        })
      }

      freq_seleccio <- colMeans(seleccio_vars)
      vars_sel      <- which(freq_seleccio > 0.75)

      # ✅ p = 0.5 fix, igual que el codi de referència
      m <- metriques(vars_sel, p = 0.5, nv = num_vars2)

      cat(sprintf("  [DIAG i=%d j=%d] Max freq: %.2f | Vars sel: %d | Sens: %.2f | Esp: %.2f\n",
                  i, j, max(freq_seleccio), length(vars_sel),
                  m["sensibilitat"], m["especificitat"]))

      # Retornem vector nomenat amb unname per evitar noms compostos
      result <- unname(m)
      names(result) <- c("sensibilitat","especificitat","VPP","VPN","accuracy","net_benefit")
      result

    }) |>
      progressify() |>
      futurize(seed = 123)

    # ── Recollir resultats ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(resultats_raw, function(x) {
      x <- unname(x)
      names(x) <- c("sensibilitat","especificitat","VPP","VPN","accuracy","net_benefit")
      x
    }))

    resultats_boot_50 <- rbind(
      resultats_boot_50,
      data.frame(
        N             = N,
        pi            = pi_val,
        correlation   = correlation,
        Sensibilitat  = mean(mat[, "sensibilitat"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        Especificitat = mean(mat[, "especificitat"], na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP           = mean(mat[, "VPP"],           na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN           = mean(mat[, "VPN"],           na.rm = TRUE),
        Accuracy      = mean(mat[, "accuracy"],      na.rm = TRUE),
        NetBenefit    = mean(mat[, "net_benefit"],   na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )

    # Guardat parcial després de cada escenari
    save(resultats_boot_50, file = "resultats_boot_50_parcial.RData")
    cat(sprintf("  >>> Escenari %d completat | Sens=%.3f | Esp=%.3f | VPP=%.3f\n",
                i,
                mean(mat[, "sensibilitat"],  na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(mat[, "especificitat"], na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(mat[, "VPP"],           na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
})

print(resultats_boot_50)
save(resultats_boot_50, file = "resultats_boot_50_final.RData")
```

```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData") 

library(bigstep)
library(futurize)
library(progressify)
library(caret)

plan(multisession, workers = 12) #nuclis per a la paralel·lització

iters_boot <- iters * 2
num_vars2  <- num_vars / 2    
num_sig2   <- num_vars2 / 2   
B          <- 20

metriques <- function(vars_seleccionades, p = 0.5, nv) {
  num_sig     <- nv / 2
  real_labels <- c(rep(1, num_sig), rep(0, nv - num_sig))
  pred_labels <- rep(0, nv)
  pred_labels[vars_seleccionades] <- 1

  cm <- caret::confusionMatrix(
    as.factor(pred_labels),
    as.factor(real_labels),
    positive = "1"
  )

  TP <- cm$table[2, 2]; FP <- cm$table[2, 1]
  FN <- cm$table[1, 2]; TN <- cm$table[1, 1]

  c(sensibilitat  = ifelse((TP+FN)==0, NA, TP/(TP+FN)),
    especificitat = ifelse((TN+FP)==0, NA, TN/(TN+FP)),
    VPP           = ifelse((TP+FP)==0, NA, TP/(TP+FP)),
    VPN           = ifelse((TN+FN)==0, NA, TN/(TN+FN)),
    accuracy      = (TP+TN)/(TP+TN+FP+FN),
    net_benefit   = (TP/nv) - (FP/nv)*(p/(1-p)))
}

#  Bucle principal 
resultats_boot_50 <- data.frame(
  N=integer(), pi=numeric(), correlation=character(),
  FP_075=numeric(), FP_075_pct=numeric(), TP_075=numeric(), TP_075_pct=numeric(),
  sens_075=numeric(), esp_075=numeric(), VPP_075=numeric(), VPN_075=numeric(),
  acc_075=numeric(), NB_075=numeric(),
  FP_050=numeric(), FP_050_pct=numeric(), TP_050=numeric(), TP_050_pct=numeric(),
  sens_050=numeric(), esp_050=numeric(), VPP_050=numeric(), VPN_050=numeric(),
  acc_050=numeric(), NB_050=numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb[i, "N"]
    pi_val      <- as.numeric(comb[i, "pi"])
    correlation <- as.character(comb[i, "correlation"])

    cat(sprintf("\n=== Escenari %d/%d: N=%s, pi=%s, corr=%s ===\n",
                i, nrow(comb), N, pi_val, correlation))

    X2_i <- X2[[i]]
    Y2_i <- Y2[[i]]

    resultats_raw <- lapply(1:iters_boot, function(j) {

      library(bigstep)
      library(caret)

      X_base <- X2_i[[j]]
      y_base <- Y2_i[[j]]
      n_boot <- nrow(X_base)

      seleccio_vars <- matrix(0, nrow = B, ncol = num_vars2)
      colnames(seleccio_vars) <- paste0("X", 1:num_vars2)

      b_valids <- 0

      for (b in 1:B) {
        idx_boot <- sample(1:n_boot, n_boot, replace = TRUE)
        X_boot   <- X_base[idx_boot, ]
        y_boot   <- y_base[idx_boot]

        tryCatch({
          d     <- prepare_data(y = y_boot, X_boot, type = "logistic")
          model <- stepwise(d, crit = aic)

          if (length(model$model) > 0) {
            idx_sel <- as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9]", "", model$model))
            idx_sel <- idx_sel[!is.na(idx_sel) & idx_sel >= 1 & idx_sel <= num_vars2]
            if (length(idx_sel) > 0) {
              seleccio_vars[b, idx_sel] <- 1
            }
          }
          b_valids <- b_valids + 1

        }, error = function(e) {
          cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d, boot %d: %s\n",
                      i, j, b, conditionMessage(e)))
        })
      }

      if (b_valids > 0) {
        freq_seleccio <- colMeans(seleccio_vars[1:B, , drop = FALSE])
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("  [ERROR TOTAL] Escenari %d, sim %d: cap rèplica vàlida\n", i, j))
        freq_seleccio <- rep(0, num_vars2)
      }

      vars_sel_075 <- which(freq_seleccio > 0.75)
      vars_sel_050 <- which(freq_seleccio > 0.50)

      if (length(vars_sel_075) > 0) {
        m_075 <- metriques(vars_sel_075, p = pi_val, nv = num_vars2)
      } else {
        m_075 <- c(sensibilitat=0, especificitat=1, VPP=NA, VPN=1,
                   accuracy=(num_vars2-num_sig2)/num_vars2, net_benefit=0)
      }

      if (length(vars_sel_050) > 0) {
        m_050 <- metriques(vars_sel_050, p = pi_val, nv = num_vars2)
      } else {
        m_050 <- c(sensibilitat=0, especificitat=1, VPP=NA, VPN=1,
                   accuracy=(num_vars2-num_sig2)/num_vars2, net_benefit=0)
      }

      cat(sprintf("  [DIAG i=%d j=%d] Vàlids: %d/%d | Max freq: %.2f | TP_075: %d | FP_075: %d\n",
                  i, j, b_valids, B, max(freq_seleccio),
                  sum(vars_sel_075 <= num_sig2), sum(vars_sel_075 > num_sig2)))

      result <- c(
        sum(vars_sel_075 > num_sig2),   # fp_075
        sum(vars_sel_075 <= num_sig2),  # tp_075
        sum(vars_sel_050 > num_sig2),   # fp_050
        sum(vars_sel_050 <= num_sig2),  # tp_050
        unname(m_075),                  # sens_075, esp_075, VPP_075, VPN_075, acc_075, NB_075
        unname(m_050)                   # sens_050, esp_050, VPP_050, VPN_050, acc_050, NB_050
      )
      names(result) <- c("fp_075","tp_075","fp_050","tp_050",
                         "sens_075","esp_075","VPP_075","VPN_075","acc_075","NB_075",
                         "sens_050","esp_050","VPP_050","VPN_050","acc_050","NB_050")
      result

    }) |>
      progressify() |>
      futurize(seed = 123)

    # resultats 
    mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(resultats_raw, function(x) {
      x <- unname(x)
      names(x) <- c("fp_075","tp_075","fp_050","tp_050",
                    "sens_075","esp_075","VPP_075","VPN_075","acc_075","NB_075",
                    "sens_050","esp_050","VPP_050","VPN_050","acc_050","NB_050")
      x
    }))

    resultats_boot_50 <- rbind(
      resultats_boot_50,
      data.frame(
        N           = N,
        pi          = pi_val,
        correlation = correlation,
        FP_075      = mean(mat[, "fp_075"]),
        FP_075_pct  = mean(mat[, "fp_075"]) / (num_vars2 - num_sig2),
        TP_075      = mean(mat[, "tp_075"]),
        TP_075_pct  = mean(mat[, "tp_075"]) / num_sig2,
        sens_075    = mean(mat[, "sens_075"], na.rm = TRUE),
        esp_075     = mean(mat[, "esp_075"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP_075     = mean(mat[, "VPP_075"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN_075     = mean(mat[, "VPN_075"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        acc_075     = mean(mat[, "acc_075"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        NB_075      = mean(mat[, "NB_075"],   na.rm = TRUE),
        FP_050      = mean(mat[, "fp_050"]),
        FP_050_pct  = mean(mat[, "fp_050"]) / (num_vars2 - num_sig2),
        TP_050      = mean(mat[, "tp_050"]),
        TP_050_pct  = mean(mat[, "tp_050"]) / num_sig2,
        sens_050    = mean(mat[, "sens_050"], na.rm = TRUE),
        esp_050     = mean(mat[, "esp_050"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP_050     = mean(mat[, "VPP_050"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN_050     = mean(mat[, "VPN_050"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        acc_050     = mean(mat[, "acc_050"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        NB_050      = mean(mat[, "NB_050"],   na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )

    save(resultats_boot_50, file = "resultats_boot_50_parcial.RData")
    cat(sprintf("  >>> Escenari %d completat | TP_075=%.2f | FP_075=%.2f | Sens=%.3f | Esp=%.3f\n",
                i,
                mean(mat[, "tp_075"]),
                mean(mat[, "fp_075"]),
                mean(mat[, "sens_075"], na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(mat[, "esp_075"],  na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
})

print(resultats_boot_50)
save(resultats_boot_50, file = "resultats_boot_50_final.RData")
```
